caption: The video appears to be an educational or informational session discussing the dynamics of a rural community food system, specifically focusing on retailers willing to source local products and the impact on product cost and price. The presenter, Gene Bellinger, is seen in a small window on the right side of the screen, wearing headphones and speaking about the topic. The main content of the video is displayed on the left side, featuring a webpage titled "Rural Community Food System" with a section labeled "13R Retailers willing to source local & Product Cost/Price." This section explains how retailers sourcing locally can increase the availability of local products, which tends to lower product costs and increase local consumption, thereby supporting those retailers. A circular diagram on the right illustrates this concept with various arrows indicating relationships between factors such as availability, product cost, and local consumption. The overall presentation aims to explain the reinforcing cycle within the retail food system cluster.
